name: Lollipops
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon Peppermint or Cinnamon Oil; or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine sugar, corn syrup, water, and salt.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
3. Continue boiling until the candy thermometer registers 300-310°F (or a drop of the mixture forms a brittle strand when placed in cold water).
4. Remove from heat and stir in 1/2 to 1 teaspoon Peppermint or Cinnamon Oil.
5. Stir in several drops of Red or Green Food Coloring until combined.
6. Pour the syrup into small, round shapes on a lightly oiled marble slab and insert a paper lollipop stick into each shape.
7. Alternatively, pour the syrup into lightly oiled small or regular cupcake tins and insert a popsicle stick into each cup.
8. Allow the lollipops to harden completely.
9. Carefully remove the hardened lollipops from the marble surface or cupcake tins.
10. Individually wrap each lollipop in plastic wrap to prevent them from sticking together.
Yield: 2 dozen small lollipops or 1 dozen large lollipops.
